entries.title: PRD Watcher — daily SharePoint sync with auto-apply + flag
entries.what: Scheduled agent (prd-watcher-daily, 9am EDT) reads Monil's PCE PRD and Nipun's Exam Mgmt roadmap + PRD via M365 MCP. Diffs against snapshots. Applies clear changes to code; flags ambiguous ones to docs/watch/flags/. Registry at docs/watch/registry.json. 3 docs registered.
entries.why: Prevent design drift — when Monil or Nipun updates a PRD, code should reflect it by next morning without Romit having to prompt.

entries.title: Compliance sweep — weekly FERPA/HIPAA/WCAG audit across all product TSX
entries.what: Scheduled agent (compliance-sweep-weekly, Mon 8am EDT) greps all product TSX files for 12 rule violations: FERPA student-ID coexistence, WCAG opacity-60-on-text, missing aria-hidden on FA icons, raw table usage, toast usage, missing DataTable empty state, and more. Writes to docs/watch/violation-inventory.json and docs/watch/compliance-report.md. P1/P2/P3 severity with consequence language.
entries.why: FERPA violation = $43K–$274K fine per incident. WCAG failures block government contracts. Audit must run automatically — not only when Romit notices a problem.

entries.title: Doc Watcher UI — paste SharePoint links, validate duplicates, registry management
entries.what: Next.js app at tools/doc-watcher/ (localhost:3002, deployed to Vercel). Registry page: paste one or many SharePoint URLs, Check Links validates duplicates, Add prompts for product + label. Updates page: filterable feed of PRD changes, compliance findings, corrections — grouped by date, P1 entries red-bordered. GitHub API backend — no database.
entries.why: Romit needed a simple interface to register new docs without editing JSON by hand. Also a cross-reference surface to show stakeholders what changed and why.

entries.title: DS snapshot — 44-component API surface, eliminates per-session DS source reads
entries.what: Python script (scripts/build_ds_snapshot.py) reads exxat-ds/packages/ui/src/, extracts variants, sizes, and key props via regex into docs/watch/ds-snapshot.json (44 components). Compliance-reviewer now reads snapshot in Step 0 instead of full source files. Daily refresh agent (ds-snapshot-refresh, 10am EDT) keeps it current.
entries.why: Reading full DS source per session cost ~4K tokens/component. Snapshot reduces it to ~50 tokens/grep — 80× reduction in DS lookup cost.

entries.title: Stakeholder decision cache — 6 PCE decisions + weekly Granola transcript extraction
entries.what: docs/watch/stakeholder-decisions.json seeded with 6 confirmed PCE PRD decisions (Monil Pokar): program-level scope, clinical CE focus, anonymous responses, N=5 threshold, 1-5 Likert enforced, 7-year retention. PRD watcher Step 6 extracts new decisions on every sync. Granola intake agent (Mon 9am EDT) pulls raw 7-day transcripts and extracts Aarti/Vishaka directives.
entries.why: Eliminates re-reading PRDs + transcripts every session to answer 'what did Aarti confirm about X'. Queryable JSON, transcript-level granularity — not synthesised summaries.

entries.title: Transcript→PRD diff — weekly P1 flag when Aarti directive contradicts PRD
entries.what: Scheduled agent (transcript-prd-diff-weekly, Tue 9am EDT) reads 14 days of Granola transcripts, extracts directives from Aarti/Adi/Vishaka, cross-references against PRD snapshots. Any contradiction flagged P1 to docs/watch/flags/{product}.md with exact transcript quote + contradicting PRD text side by side.
entries.why: The cohort-filter incident: Aarti's 'no filters' directive was in the raw transcript but not in the summary — a filter was built and removed after two verification cycles. This agent catches that error class automatically.

entries.title: BUILD-STATUS auto-sync from Nipun's Excel roadmap
entries.what: PRD watcher Steps 7a–7f: when exam-roadmap-nipun Excel is processed, extract project status grid, map Excel status values (Completed→🟢 Shipped, In Progress→🟡 In Progress, Not Started→⚪ Not started), update docs/BUILD-STATUS.md Exam Management section inline. No manual updates needed.
entries.why: BUILD-STATUS.md was going stale — Nipun marks items complete in Excel but the doc required a manual update. Now syncs every morning.

entries.title: __updates() dev console — daily PRD + compliance feed in browser DevTools
entries.what: window.__updates() registered in both pce and exam-management admin apps. Auto-prints P1/prd-change summary on page load (dev only, tree-shaken in prod). Supports filters: __updates('today'), __updates('pce'), __updates('corrections'), __updates('p1'), __updates('week').
entries.why: Romit can cross-reference design decisions in the browser while building — see what changed today without switching tabs. Zero product UI pollution.
